data.title: Beware of the misleading term "Active Treasury" - digital asset treasuries are becoming operators, not holders, raising concerns about governance and regulation.
data.description: The concept of an "Active Treasury" can be confusing for many. Companies with digital asset treasuries are now seeking higher returns through staking and tokens, transitioning from passive holders to active operators. This shift necessitates a more structured governance system akin to traditional fund management practices, or else they may face reclassification under regulatory frameworks.

data.title: Over 80% of non-dollar stablecoins are in Euro, led by EURC as MiCA and Visa integrations boost adoption.
data.description: Over 80% of non-dollar supply is currently dominated by Euro stablecoins, with EURC leading in trading volumes. This surge is attributed to the increasing integration of MiCA regulations and payment rail support, driving adoption of Euro-based stablecoins in the market.

data.title: XRP's price may drop 50% despite Goldman Sachs' $152M ETF stake, with volatility down ahead of potential significant moves.
data.description: Goldman Sachs recently disclosed that they have a $152 million investment in spot XRP ETFs. At the same time, market volatility has decreased to levels typically observed before significant price fluctuations in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bayer Crop Science Canada Redefines Canola Innovation With New "Advancing Better Canola" Initiative
data.description: Bayer Crop Science Canada has introduced the Advancing Better Canola (ABCs) initiative in Calgary, Alberta. The program aims to revolutionize canola innovation for Canadian farmers. Bayer ABCs, set to continue through 2026, seeks to reshape industry perceptions by engaging in discussions, fostering collaboration, and promoting advocacy. By merging genetics, agronomy, crop protection, and digital technologies, the initiative aims to explore deeper insights into improving canola cultivation. Bayer believes that significant advancements in canola innovation demand a comprehensive approach that goes beyond traditional methods.

data.title: The Sherri Eisenpress Scholarship for LGBTQ+ Excellence Opens 2026 Application Cycle for Undergraduate Leaders Nationwide
data.description: In Rockland County, New York, on March 26, 2026, the annual Sherri Eisenpress Scholarship for LGBTQ+ Excellence has officially opened applications for the 2026 award season. This year, the scholarship will grant a $1,000 prize to a deserving undergraduate student who showcases outstanding leadership qualities and a strong vision for the future.

data.title: Binance criticized as $1.7B crypto funneled to Iran, revealed after a year of visible clues.
data.description: The largest cryptocurrency exchange globally faces scrutiny as investigators discovered that accounts had transferred $1.7 billion to Iranian entities. Despite the clues being visible for more than a year, the exchange is now under fire for these transactions.

data.title: Key decisions from Novo Nordisk A/S AGM: Approved dividend of $3.00 per share; re-elected all board members; ratified CEO's compensation.
data.description: The total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has surpassed 5 million, with over 300,000 reported deaths. In the United States alone, there have been over 1.5 million cases and more than 90,000 deaths. These numbers continue to rise as countries work to combat the spread of the virus through social distancing measures and testing. Efforts are being made globally to develop a vaccine to help prevent further infections.
Reports from Ukraine: Power outages have occurred on the left bank of Kyiv, as well as in the Brovary and Boryspil districts

data.title: OMNICOM MEDIA NAMED BEST PERFORMING GLOBAL MEDIA GROUP, EARNS #1 RANKING ACROSS ALL FOUR REGIONS
data.description: In the most recent RECMA Diagnostics Report, the advertising agency OMD has achieved the top spot for the 11th time in a row. Additionally, PHD, Initiative, and UM have all secured positions in the top ten rankings. This news was revealed in New York on March 26, 2026, as per PRNewswire. This report highlights the success of OMD and other leading agencies within the industry.

data.title: "10x10": Off-White™ Icons Reimagined; 10 trailblazing global Creatives reshape 10 Off-White™ icons
data.description: In Milan on March 26, 2026, Off-White™ revealed a unique project titled 10x10: Off-White™ Icons Reimagined. This innovative initiative showcases 10 iconic pieces from the Off-White™ collection as blank canvases, creatively reinterpreted by 10 pioneering artists from around the world.

data.title: LangChain releases Agent Middleware for tailored AI agent creation, with hooks for PII detection and dynamic tool selection. Explore now.
data.description: LangChain has unveiled its new AgentMiddleware system, granting developers the ability to tailor AI agent behavior through hooks for the detection of Personally Identifiable Information (PII), dynamic tool selection, and implementation of production-ready features. This innovative system offers extensive customization options for developers looking to enhance AI agent functionality.

data.title: West Virginia American Water Invests $815,000 in Huntington Infrastructure
data.description: In Huntington, West Virginia, a substantial infrastructure upgrade project totaling $815,000 is underway on South Walnut Street. West Virginia American Water has confirmed the initiative as a crucial investment in the local community, aimed at enhancing the water system's resilience and efficiency.

data.title: Learning Beyond Paper Launches "Learning Beyond the Bell," the First Fully Digital, Bilingual Curriculum Designed for Afterschool and Out-of-School Time Programs
data.description: A recently launched platform is designed to assist students in grades K-6 with project-based curriculum that aligns with educational standards in six different learning areas. This initiative was introduced in West Palm Beach, Florida on March 26, 2026. Educators nationwide dedicate significant effort to help students throughout the school day.

data.title: Comporium Expands Fiber Network in Transylvania County With $4.7 Million Investment
data.description: In Brevard, N.C., over 500 homes and businesses in Transylvania County now benefit from Comporium's fiber-based internet service. The company recently completed the installation of about 64 miles of fiber, extending connectivity to 517 locations. This expansion allows residents and businesses in the area to access high-speed internet with speeds up to 1 Gigabit per second (Gbps). This enhanced connectivity supports various activities like work, education, healthcare, and entertainment for the community.
